title: Flavorful Hearty Slovakian Pork Casserole
description: A comforting Slovakian dish featuring Thai chilli jam and bhuna, this casserole is egg-free-friendly and perfect for a cold winter night. The jammy and glassy-jelly texture of the dish is sure to delight.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and cook the diced pork until browned.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent.
Add the bhuna curry paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the Thai chilli jam, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
